childhood.familyBackground: Heir to the Meijer family fortune, a Dutch textile and retail dynasty with roots in fashion and retail business.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 네덜란드 섬유 및 소매 왕조의 메이어 가족 재산 상속자
childhood.education: European private schools with focus on business
childhood.earlyLife: Born into retail privilege, exposed to family business from childhood. Spent formative years in Netherlands and European capitals.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 소매 특권 속에 태어났으며 어린 시절부터 가족 사업에 노출됨. 네덜란드와 유럽 주요 도시에서 성장

careerTimeline.event: Entered family retail business after education
careerTimeline.eventKo: 교육 후 가족 소매 사업에 진출

careerTimeline.event: Expanded fashion portfolio into luxury segments
Diversified into sustainable fashion and e-commerce
careerTimeline.eventKo: 지속 가능한 패션 및 전자상거래로 다각화

failures.description: Retail subsidiaries faced losses during financial crisis
failures.descriptionKo: 금융 위기 중 소매 자회사가 손실을 입음
failures.lesson: Diversification is essential for weathering cycles
failures.lessonKo: 경제 주기를 견디기 위해 다각화가 필수

quotes.text: The future of retail lies in understanding tradition and innovation
quotes.textKo: 소매의 미래는 전통과 혁신을 이해하는 것에 있다

recommended.title: The Lean Startup
recommended.author: Eric Ries
recommended.note: Influences business strategy and innovation approach
recommended.noteKo: 비즈니스 전략 및 혁신 접근에 영향

personalTraits.knownFor: Building bridges between traditional family business and digital innovation
personalTraits.knownForKo: 전통적 가족 사업과 디지털 혁신 사이의 다리 건설
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports cultural heritage preservation and fashion education
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 문화유산 보존 및 패션 교육을 지원
